favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: You have not saved any favorite routes yet.

history.title: History
history.empty: There are no recent searches yet.

map.title: Schematic map
map.caption: Select a route to preview it here

results.title: Results
results.emptySummary: Search for a route to begin.
results.noResultsSummary: No routes were found for this search.

detail.title: Route detail
detail.empty: Select a route to see the full detail.
detail.noAlerts: There are no active alerts for this route.

status.emptyText: Select origin, destination and conditions to see your options.
status.errorText: We could not load the app correctly.

rules.title: How we calculate routes
rules.time: Base time = sum of time_min for each segment.
rules.conditions: For each active condition: time = time × (1 + time_pct / 100).
rules.cost: Total cost = sum of cost + sum of cost_extra from conditions.
rules.sort: Default order: time. You can also sort by cost or transfers.

alerts.paro: The strike increases time and cost.

validation.same: Origin and destination cannot be the same.
